title: pergularia purpurea
intro: Pergularia purpurea, also known as Kulthi or Black Gram, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pergularia purpurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Pergularia purpurea is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
